name: Bull Shoals State Park Access (White River)
notes: First access below Bull Shoals Dam; watch generation schedule.

name: Cotter Access / Big Spring Park (White River)
notes: Town reach at Cotter, 'Trout Capital USA'.

name: Norfork Access (White-North Fork confluence)
notes: Ramp at the downstream end of the Bull Shoals catch-and-release reach.

name: Quarry Park below Norfork Dam (North Fork River)
notes: Wade and bank access at the head of the Norfork tailwater.

name: JFK Park below Greers Ferry Dam (Little Red River)
notes: Corps park at the top of the tailwater, near the federal hatchery.

name: Mammoth Spring / Dam 3 (Spring River)
notes: Top of the Spring River trout water at Mammoth Spring.
